data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a technical issue protocol, specifically regarding lost connections during the exam. While the linked use case mentions that the connection was lost and the candidate was able to rejoin, it does not provide concrete evidence of a defined protocol or specific API endpoints that handle such scenarios. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not confirm the existence of a formalized technical issue protocol.
gaps: No evidence of a defined technical issue protocol for lost connections.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define technical issue protocol endpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete API endpoints and documentation that outline the technical issue protocol for lost connections.
